title: Noquivzor

{{Quote|You'll be moving from the fleet to a world called Noquivzor and you will stage from there. Several other units will join you there, including Defender Wing.|[[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Gial Ackbar]], to [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]]|<ref name="X-Wing: Rogue Squadron">''[[X-Wing: Rogue Squadron]]''</ref>}}
'''Noquivzor''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]].

==Description==
{{Quote|Fey'lya arranged for this meeting to be held here, on Noquivzor. He is right at home here—these savannahs closely resemble his home range on Bothawui.|[[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]], to [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]]|<ref name="X-Wing: Wedge's Gamble">''[[X-Wing: Wedge's Gamble]]''</ref>}}
[[File:Noquivzor_2.jpg|thumb|left|220px|Noquivzor's landscape]]
Noquivzor was an aesthetically pleasing [[Planet/Legends|planet]] which consisted mainly of rolling grassland and savannas of [[Color/Legends|yellow]] and orange. It had an arid climate, wide blue skies, and a lack of [[Tree/Legends|trees]]. It bore some similarities to the [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of [[Bothawui/Legends|Bothawui]], but had very little in common with the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] homeworld of [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]].

==History==
{{Quote|He uses it for strikes against high-profile targets. Not targets that are easier than the others, nor harder, just more visible. Such as the assault on Noquivzor, designed to destroy Rogue Squadron—what a coup that would have been.|[[Garik Loran]], about the [[Iron Fist (Executor-class)|''Iron Fist'']]|<ref name="X-Wing: Iron Fist">''[[X-Wing: Iron Fist]]''</ref>}}
[[File:New_Republic_Hall.jpg|thumb|right|250px|[[New Republic Hall]], on Noquivzor]]
Noquivzor joined the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] prior to the [[Indecta Era]]. During the [[Alsakan Conflicts/Legends|Alsakan Conflicts]], it supported [[Alsakan/Legends|Alsakan]].<ref name="TEGtW" />

It played a vital role in the preparations for the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic's]] [[Battle of Borleias|assaults]] on [[Borleias/Legends|Borleias]] and [[Liberation of Coruscant (Galactic Civil War)|later]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].

The [[New Republic Provisional Council]] met on this planet prior to the conquest of Coruscant at the behest of [[Council]]or [[Borsk Fey'lya]] who was indulging in cheap political trickery. [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] was officially based on the planet, but unofficially they were off scouting out Coruscant prior to the eventual conquest of the planet. The rumors were enough for [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Zsinj]] to turn up with the [[Iron Fist (Executor-class)|''Iron Fist'']] and [[Battle of Noquivzor|flatten]] the [[Noquivzor Base|base]] there as vengeance for the capture of ''[[Contruum's Pride]]'' and ''[[Vengeance Derra IV]]''. [[General/Legends|General]] [[Edor Crespin]] was rumored to have been amongst the wounded in the attack. Mechanics [[Zraii]] and [[Koyi Komad]] escaped injury with the rest of Rogue Squadron's [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-Wings]].

After the [[Orbital bombardment/Legends|bombardment]], [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Ackbar]] and Borsk Fey'lya agreed that the conquest of Coruscant needed to be hastened so the New Republic could immediately go after Zsinj and make him pay.

{{Planet-stub}}
